title: Add all abbreviations from all Pāḷi texts to DPD
body:
It would be useful to have a complete list of _all_ abbreviations in _all_ Pāḷi texts inside DPD, for ease of reference. 

- [ ] Add PTS abbreviations (some [here](https://dsal.uchicago.edu/dictionaries/pali/frontmatter/abbreviations.html), also check [Cone](https://gandhari.org/dictionary?section=dop))
- [ ] Add BJT abbreviations
- [ ] Add CST Abbreviations (Some, but not all, are [here](https://tipitaka.org/help))
- [ ] Add SYA Abbreviations 
- [ ] Add MST Abbreviations ([here](https://suttacentral.net/abbreviations?lang=en))
- [ ] Add DPD Abbreviations 
- [ ] Code to process TSVs and include in exporter
- [ ] How to present abbreviations? Individually? Grouped?
- [ ] Update on docs website
- [ ] Delete old abbreviations from database
